title: DURACELL CR2 (2 Pack) High Power Lithium Battery 3V (CR15H270) – Long life guarantee – For Alarm Motion Detectors, Thermometers, LED Lights & Electronics – 10 –Year Storage Guarantee - Leak Prevention
features: SUITABLE FOR A WIDE RANGE OF DEVICES: Duracell CR2 high power lithium batteries 3V (CR15H270) are ideal for your alarm system motion detectors, Digital Thermometer, LED lights, electronics and more
LONG LIFE GUARANTEED: you can be confident these batteries will be ready when you need them
10 YEARS IN STORAGE GUARANTEED: Our technologies keep unused batteries fresh for up to 10 years in their packaging
LEAKAGE PREVENTION: superior nylon top closure helps prevent our specialty batteries from leakage
RELIABLE batteries for your specialty devices
description: DURACELL CR2 high power lithium batteries are long life guaranteed for your specialty devices. They are suitable for use in digital cameras, flashlights, alarm system motion detectors, Digital Thermometer, LED lights, electronics and more. With 10 years in storage, you can be confident they will be ready when you need them.
